doc: A playable saw synth with one 'brightness' Good Button. The public boundary is two interface pipes: send notes to /notes/in to play, then sweep /brightness/in [0..1] — a single knob fanned to a MASTER filter's cutoff AND resonance, each over its own musical range, smoothed into the audio rate. `/brightness` is now the pipe (the smoothing `m2s` knob moved to `/brightness_cv`), so the public /brightness/in address is the pipe's port and external senders keep working unchanged. The 8 voices are hosted `good-button-voice` sub-patches (saw -> ADSR VCA); the voicer sums them and one shared filter tones the mix. Built entirely from composition: the `brightness` pipe feeds an internal `m2s` (`/brightness_cv`) smoothing the held value into a CV Signal, fanned to two ranged `map`s wired into the master filter's Signal cutoff/resonance inputs. Presentation lives in surfaces/good-button.json.

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 good-button-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio. Notes arrive through the `notes` interface pipe (/notes/in).
Master lowpass on the summed mix; cutoff + resonance are Signal inputs driven by the Good Button.

Good Button smoother, fed by the public `brightness` pipe: the held knob value [0,1] smoothed into a CV Signal (an `m2s` is the value->signal converter), then fanned to the two ranged maps below. The public address stays /brightness/in — that is the pipe's port now; the pipe's default rests it at 0.5.

brightness [0,1] -> cutoff [400,12000] Hz, exponential (perceptually even). Reads the smoothed brightness Signal from /brightness_cv and ranges it per-sample (Signal->Signal) into the master filter cutoff.
brightness [0,1] -> resonance [0.1,0.85], linear. Reads the smoothed brightness Signal from /brightness_cv.
